title: Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
